arts.ttl: Exclusive: Player wants Tottenham exit in January, clubs to begin negotiations
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur defender Sergio Reguilon wants to leave the club in January so that he can play regular first-team football once again. The 27-year-old defender has not been included in the Premier League or Europa League matchday squads at Tottenham Hotspur this season, and he plans to terminate his contract with the club in January, […] The post Exclusive: Player wants Tottenham exit in January, clubs to begin negotiations appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: FA charges Spurs over alleged homophobic chanting
arts.sum: Tottenham are charged over alleged homophobic chanting by their fans during a 3-0 win over Manchester United earlier this season.

arts.ttl: ‘On a roll’: Chris Sutton reckons ‘underrated’ Tottenham player could rip Ipswich to shreds now
arts.sum: Tottenham face Ipswich Town on Sunday in a game that Spurs will surely be relishing. Tottenham are coming off the back of a very good...

arts.ttl: Spurs transfer news: La Liga 26-year-old identified as alternative to Real Madrid-linked Pedro Porro?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly move to identify a potential replacement for Pedro Porro, who has been linked with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal regularly scouting £42m gem Tottenham see as potential Cristian Romero long-term replacement
arts.sum: He is 'one of the most exciting young talents in Europe'!

arts.ttl: Tottenham tipped to be Liverpool and Man City's closest Premier League title challengers
arts.sum: Spurs take on Ipswich Town at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, looking to continue their fine home form. If Chelsea and Arsenal draw, Villa lose to or draw with Liverpool and Forest lose to Newcastle, Spurs would go up to third with victory over Ipswich on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Why Ange Postecoglou isn't worried about Tottenham's lack of trophies dating back to 2008 - as chairman Daniel Levy's ambition is questioned after engraved watch saga
arts.sum: 'Aussie' Ange Postecoglou insists he has not experienced anything at Tottenham which has 'curtailed' his ambition to achieve sustained success at the Premier League club.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists Tottenham must focus on delivering 'sustained success' - after former captain Hugo Lloris slammed club's mentality
arts.sum: The club has been stung by criticism from former captain Hugo Lloris in his new book, who suggested the club were happy to finish second during his spell there.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou rubs salt in Arsenal's wounds as Tottenham boss sets new target
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has claimed Arsenal do not have any room to play with if Mikel Arteta's side are to become Premier League champions as Tottenham boss says winning points total might be lower

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Daniel Levy statement after Hugo Lloris' Tottenham criticism
arts.sum: Then when Tottenham lost in Madrid to Liverpool, the former captain got the impression at the post-match reception at the team hotel that some people from the club were "not sufficiently despondent at having lost....when I returned to my room on the night of the final, I think I had the same feeling as Mauricio [Pochettino] and Harry [Kane]: does the club really want to win? Ange Postecoglou has had his say on Hugo Lloris' comments about Daniel Levy and the club's ambition and stated that he does not feel restricted in what he wants to achieve at Tottenham Hotspur.
